summary: Reno Cybertruck on FSD v13.2.4 fails to merge out of an ending lane on Stead Blvd, hits curb then light pole; driver admits he was not watching and posts a PSA (later deleted).
notes: ORIGINAL owner post (later deleted; status ID preserved via news quotes). Not in clips.json. Distinct from Houston Cybertruck / Katy house. News aliases are not originals.

summary: Coast-to-coast FSD attempt (~60 miles in): Model Y on FSD hits a large metal girder/ramp on the freeway, goes airborne, and sustains major suspension/battery damage; passenger spotted debris early but driver intervened late.
notes: ORIGINAL crash-reveal video post. Not in clips.json. Prefer over Electrek news alias / same-event series posts.
